title: Director, Cape Early Childhood Center
notes: Cape Girardeau Public Schools operates a dedicated Cape Early Childhood Center (CECC) at 330 N Spring St; April Garner is the ECC director (priority 1). Email not posted on staff page; district pattern is lastname+firstinitial@capetigers.com (e.g., Asst Supt Academic Services James Russell = russellj@capetigers.com), inferred email likely garnera@capetigers.com - flag for Apollo verification. Backup contact: Jamie/James Russell, Asst Supt Academic Services, russellj@capetigers.com. Larger urban district (~4k students), strong fit for ECE outreach.

title: Superintendent

Laboube listed in older sources; current status unverified - flag for Apollo. District uses fcr2.org domain (note: not franklincountyr2.k12.mo.us as in input).

title: Superintendent
notes: Owensville-based district with PreK-5 elementary buildings in both Owensville and Gerald. Superintendent is default contact (priority 5). No public ECE director identified. Email format on dutchmen.us domain - flag for Apollo lookup.

title: Principal, Grain Valley Early Childhood Center
notes: Dedicated Early Childhood Center at 31604 NE Pink Hill Rd; Dr. Jessica Carroll is the ECC principal/director (priority 1). Shannon Jenkins (prior director) departed to Springfield Public Schools in 2024. Email on grainvalleyschools.org domain - flag for Apollo. Backup: Dr. Brandi Gump, Director of Curriculum & Instruction; Dr. Amanda Allen, Asst Supt Academic & Student Services. Larger district (~4k students).

notes: Whitehead explicitly owns Early Childhood at Hillsboro (priority 1 match - role title literally includes Early Childhood). Oversees ECSE, special services, and Parents as Teachers program. Strong target. Larger Jefferson County district.
